title: Basic Safeguarding of Covered Contractor Information Systems

requirements.requirement_summary: Limit information system access to authorized users, processes acting on behalf of authorized users, and authorized devices.
requirements.machine_actionable_instruction: Verify that access controls restrict system access to approved users, approved service accounts, and authorized devices.

requirements.requirement_summary: Limit system access to the types of transactions and functions authorized users are permitted to execute.
requirements.machine_actionable_instruction: Review roles and permissions to confirm that users can perform only approved functions.

disclaimer: This file is an illustrative sample and does not include the complete commercial rule library.
